hooks.command: cmd="$CLAUDE_CODE_COMMAND"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(grep|cat|find|git log|ls -la)\s'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Use rtk for 60-75% savings (e.g., rtk grep, rtk read). 1.2M tokens saveable from unpreixed commands."}}'; fi || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE "\.claude/projects.*memory/"; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Memory file written. Sync .agents/MEMORY.md with any new or changed content before completing."}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
